dependencies.description:
Certifi: A carefully curated collection of Root Certificates for
validating the trustworthiness of SSL certificates while verifying the
identity of TLS hosts.
dependencies.name: py-certifi

dependencies.description:
Flexible and powerful tensor operations for readable and reliable code.
Supports numpy, pytorch, tensorflow, and others.
dependencies.name: py-einops

dependencies.description: Fundamental package for array computing in Python.
dependencies.name: py-numpy

dependencies.description:
Open Neural Network Exchange (ONNX) is an open ecosystem that empowers
AI developers to choose the right tools as their project evolves. ONNX
provides an open source format for AI models, both deep learning and
traditional ML. It defines an extensible computation graph model, as
well as definitions of built-in operators and standard data types.
Currently we focus on the capabilities needed for inferencing (scoring).
dependencies.name: py-onnx

dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description:
S3FS builds on aiobotocore to provide a convenient Python filesystem
interface for S3.
dependencies.name: py-s3fs

dependencies.description:

dependencies.name: py-setuptools

dependencies.description:
Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU
acceleration.
dependencies.name: py-torch

dependencies.description: A Python implementation of tree structure.
dependencies.name: py-treelib

dependencies.description: N-D labeled arrays and datasets in Python
dependencies.name: py-xarray

dependencies.description:
Zarr is a Python package providing an implementation of chunked,
compressed, N-dimensional arrays.
